name: w2 gettr
func:
var p = msg.payload
var field_name = "w2"

if (!p.hasOwnProperty(field_name)){return;}

var w2 = p[field_name]

var mean = p["16m"]
var ewa = p["ewa"]



return [

    {"topic":"w2","payload": w2},
    { "topic": "mean", "payload": mean },
    { "topic": "ewa", "payload": ewa },

];
